author: jtraglia
content: <@363800010518822915> I restarted the devnet and it experienced some issues, but it did eventually recover after the deposits stopped which was cool to see. I would say it's performing quite well. The logs aren't terribly useful; too large to share (86 MiB) but there are a lot of messages like this. I'm going to test with a higher gas limit but with fewer deposits in total.

author: jtraglia
content: It's handling semi-regular slots with 5k deposits like a champ. Nice work!

content: which assertoor test is this? i'm only getting ~2k deposits in a block max

author: jtraglia
content: Just [committed & pushed it](https://github.com/jtraglia/kurtosis-devnets/blob/master/many-onboarded-builders-at-fork.yml) to my repo. I set the gas limit to 2 gigagas to get that 😅
